message:
fix: obligation registry type aliases, explicit lock drops, and rustfmt

Refines the SymbolicObligationRegistry arena-slot indexed lookups:

- Introduces HolderSlot and RegionSlot type aliases to reduce verbosity of
  Option<(TaskId/RegionId, Vec<ObligationId>)> repeated across field types

- Adds explicit drop(guard) calls after early-return clone paths in
  obligations_for_holder() and obligations_for_region() to release read
  locks before returning empty Vec, preventing unnecessary lock hold time

- Adds explicit drop(by_holder) after inserting into the holder index to
  release the write lock before acquiring the region write lock, reducing
  potential lock ordering contention

- src/http/h1/http_client.rs: rustfmt whitespace adjustment on
  TlsConnectorBuilder method chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
